gaps.description: Form input styles missing - no input, textarea, select, checkbox, or radio styles defined
gaps.recommendation: Add complete form component styles following existing design patterns

gaps.description: Table styles missing - cannot display tabular data consistently
Reduced motion support missing - no @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) query
gaps.recommendation: Add media query that sets animation-duration: 0.01ms and transition-duration: 0.01ms

gaps.description: Modal/dialog styles missing - no overlay or modal container
gaps.recommendation: Add .modal-overlay and .modal-container classes with backdrop blur

gaps.description: Grid columns limited - missing .grid-cols-5 for Information hub 25-zone grid
Screen reader support incomplete - missing .sr-only-focusable and skip links
gaps.recommendation: Add focusable screen reader utilities and skip link styles

blocking_issues.impact: Cannot build forms with design system alone

strengths: Complete and well-organized color palette with 22 tokens
Comprehensive typography system with full scale (xs-7xl)
All three required animation curves (harmonic, toroidal, dramatic) present
Hub-specific color variables defined for all four hubs
Excellent component coverage for media-focused hubs (SATOR, ROTAS)
next_agent_requirements: AGENT_02 (Architecture Reviewer) needs: 1) Review CSS file organization and cascade architecture, 2) Assess if form components should be in core or hub-specific CSS, 3) Evaluate reduced motion implementation approach, 4) Check for any architectural concerns with current component structure, 5) Provide guidance on table component architecture (responsive strategy)
